tasks.label: Git Push to GitHub
tasks.command: Remove-Item -Recurse -Force .git -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; git init; git config user.name 'Douri Kim'; git config user.email 'douri.kim@gmail.com'; git add -A; git commit -m 'Initial commit: French tutor website'; git branch -M main; git remote add origin https://github.com/dourikim/--------.git; git push -u origin main
